creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 164177
patch to unbreak devel/liblas12

The old version 1.2.1 of devel/liblas12 is necessary for math/saga and its LiDAR tools. They will not work with newer liblas versions.


devel/liblas12 was set BROKEN recently, because its distfile was unfetchable.

The attached patch should be able to fetch the distfile from new GitHub location and so unbreak the port.
